alt: Photo by 830Productions on April 14, 2026. May be an image of Norwich terrier and text that says 'How to take dog portraits 3 Steps'.
caption:
4 portraits. One very photogenic dog. 

Wanted to capture the personality, the detail, and that locked-in eye contact that makes pet portraits feel real. Definitely one of my favorite portrait sets I’ve shot.

Which photo is your favorite? 1-4
